speaker: speaker1
text: I was just watching a documentary on TV about how people use dogs for various purpose . It was very interesting .

speaker: speaker2
text: I love dogs . They have been used as guards for centuries . Nowadays , they are often used to find illegal drugs and bombs by the police and customs officers .

speaker: speaker1
text: The documentary also pointed out that they are used by shepherds to round up sheep and by rescue workers to find people trapped under rubble or snow .

speaker: speaker2
text: Horses are useful to people too . We use them for sports and recreation .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don ’ t forget that horses are still used in many countries to pull ploughs and carts .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I can . I don ’ t ride regularly though . How about you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I can ride too . Perhaps we could go horse riding together at the weekend ?
